name: SatisBox
author: Poki
description: SatisBox is your ultimate collection of fun and super satisfying mini-games, all in one place! Dive into a variety of simple yet oddly satisfying tasks—shave off that messy beard, pop every bubble wrap, or organize items in perfect order. Each mini-game is designed to cure your OCD cravings and bring you pure, relaxing joy. It's the perfect way to unwind and enjoy multiple fun experiences in one game. Ready to explore and find your satisfaction? How to play SatisBox? Use your mouse or finger to play! Who created SatisBox? SatisBox is created by Ercin. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play SatisBoxs for free? You can play SatisBox for free on Poki. Can I play SatisBox on mobile devices and desktop? SatisBox can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
